message:
fix(ci): resolve rustdoc warnings and manifest sync

Rustdoc warnings with -D warnings:
- hook.rs: Escape `#[ignore]` to prevent intra-doc link lookup
- tui/mod.rs: Use code spans for test-only module refs
- tui/widgets.rs: Wrap `<package>` in code span to escape HTML
- ui/mod.rs: Wrap bare URL in angle brackets for auto-linking

Manifest sync:
- Update rch/SKILL.md hash in manifest_index.sh

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
